item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder for students in grades 9 to 12 that want to dress down during your exams; you must donate at least 2 uniform items to the main office by tomorrow for your name to be on the list given to teachers.

item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There is a DRAMA Club meeting today at lunch in Rm.209

item.title: A message from Mrs. Curtis:
item.description: The results are in for the Grade 7/8 Univeristy of Waterloo Math Competition! In 3rd place, we have Jenny in Grade 7 and Stanley in Grade 8; our 2nd place Grade 7 winner is Cameron, and Hana and Sylus tied for 2nd place in Grade 8. Special congratulations to our 1st place winners: Jacklyn and Jessie ! Thank you to all of our participants for demonstrating a curiosity for math and accepting the challenge. All participants and prize winners are asked to see Mrs. Curtis to collect their certificates and prizes at Morning Break today.

item.title: A message from Mr. Kwok:
item.description: Yearbooks arrived yesterday. The yearbook committee will start handing out yearbooks to Grade 12 students today on the stage. Grade 9-11 can come for their yearbook starting tomorrow. For those 7/8 students who purchased yearbooks, they will be handed out by homeroom at a later date.

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: Could the 7/8 student council please come down to meet Mme Bourdon in the main foyer at 8:20 am. We need to take attendance before we start our day. The High school students who volunteered to help during the High School BBQ lunch will be called down once the food is ready to be organized which could be around 10:00 am.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Brennan:
item.description: Garden Club will be meeting out front again today after school for planting. See you there!
